headline: Is It Time To Reconsider American Tower (AMT) After Its Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: Wondering whether American Tower's current share price reflects its real worth, or if the market is missing something you can still act on? The stock last closed at US$176.14, with a 3.4% gain over the past 7 days, a 6.6% decline over 30 days, and returns of 0.8% year to date and a 14.6% decline over the past year. Recent coverage around American Tower has focused on its role as a specialized REIT and how investors are reassessing companies tied to digital infrastructure. This context has...
